meta.prices: Huge Stock Market Dataset (Boris Marjanovic, Kaggle, CC0 public domain); daily bars adjusted for splits and dividends.
meta.fundamentals: pe = adjusted close / last reported fiscal-year diluted EPS (SEC EDGAR XBRL, public domain), visible from each 10-K filing date.
meta.benchmark: SPY adjusted close, same CC0 dataset (ETFs/spy.us.txt).
